dataTypes.evidence: apps/mobile/lib/api.ts — sent as Bearer token in Authorization header on every API request
apps/mobile/app/(tabs)/profile.tsx — useOrganization() reads active org; used to scope API data to the correct brand
apps/mobile/app/(auth)/sign-in.tsx — email entered by user during Clerk sign-in; managed by Clerk SDK, not stored by the app directly
apps/mobile/hooks/useSurveys.ts — app READS aggregated survey data from the CustomerEQ API; does not send new survey responses

thirdPartySDKs.name: @clerk/clerk-expo
thirdPartySDKs.dataTouched: Email address, JWT tokens, org membership
thirdPartySDKs.note: Clerk connects to clerk.customereq.wellnessatwork.me FAPI on initialization

thirdPartySDKs.name: expo-notifications
thirdPartySDKs.purpose: Push notification registration (not yet wired — dependency only)

requiredReasonsAPIs: NSUserDefaults — used by Expo/React Native framework internals
privacyManifest: Expo SDK 52 ships PrivacyInfo.xcprivacy covering framework-level Required Reasons APIs. No additional app-level manifest required for current data flows.
